non_goals: A parallel source or slice contract.
internal/cli changes, which belong to Phase 2.
Jira or publication approval policy changes.
technical_acceptance_criteria: Define the accepted ADR and strict versioned contract schema.
Record canonical source identities and explicit PRD, specification, and roadmap role bindings.
Reject repeated paths, symlink aliases, identical-content aliases, missing roles, malformed contracts, and unsupported versions.
Persist owner-only contract artifacts without overwrite.
Round-trip a valid three-source contract deterministically.
validation_plan: Run focused contract schema and persistence tests.
Run make test, make vet, make build, and git diff --check.
Obtain independent exact-diff reviewer and verifier assessments from distinct external executors.

handoff.completed_work: Approved the distinct-source ticket plan, created REK-21 and its three Subtasks, and transitioned REK-22 to In Progress with read-back.
handoff.next_action: Commit the linked planning baseline, run implementation preflight, and implement the contract-schema slice.
